data.name: CYBER RONIN: Lust
data.detailed_description:
CYBER RONIN: Lust is a top-down shooter with elements of a visual novel where you play as the cyber-ronin Sumiragi Kato, who is constantly annoyed by his stepsister. As the main character, you will have to complete a series of missions and punish your stepsister with your "Katana."

The protagonist, Sumiragi Kato, is a mercenary who once fled from his family home because he didn’t want to become the heir to the Sumi Technology corporation, which practically rules City X. For a long time, the corporation left him alone, but after the chairman—his father—passes away, a power struggle begins between him and his stepsister, Sumiragi Hanna. Hanna is ruthless and cold-blooded and refuses to hand over the corporation to a brother she deems unworthy of the "throne." However, Kato couldn’t care less about all this. In order to defeat her brother, who has become a master swordsman, Hanna hires three gangs that cunningly capture his companions—women Kato deeply cherishes:

  • Jane: A blonde, athletic girl who was once crowned "Miss Cyber-Implant 2077." She’s as sly as they come.

  • Hibiki: A dark-haired Korean woman with a doll-like face. However, she was once part of a special forces unit.

  • Linda: A white-haired rebel. Before being captured, she was the leader of a biker gang but was betrayed for Sumiragi money.

Kato must rescue the girls, defeat Hanna’s henchmen, and punish his arrogant stepsister in the way only Kato knows how—with his katana and "his" sword.

The game is a top-down shooter where every mistake can lead to death. The enemies are strong, as are the weapons in their hands. Kill enemies, pick up their weapons, and create more spectacular combos! But don’t forget—you’re a ronin! Your katana is always within reach!

  • Dynamic combat system

  • A wide variety of enemies

  • 5 beautiful and very hot girls

  • 6 detailed intimate scenes

  • 15 cool erotic cards

  • 5 large missions with 3-4 meticulously designed locations to explore

  • A wide variety of firearms

data.short_description: CYBER RONIN: Lust - is a top-down shooter with elements of a visual novel where you play as the cyber-ronin Sumiragi Kato, who is constantly annoyed by his stepsister. As the main character, you will have to complete a series of missions and punish your stepsister with your "Katana."

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel(R) HD Graphics 612
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
